channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Race to rescue beluga whales from closed Canadian marine park.
item.description: Marine experts are relocating nearly three dozen beluga whales from a shuttered Canadian park in a weeks-long effort.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha reaches Gulf Coast; path tracked.
item.description: Bertha becomes the Atlantic hurricane season's second named storm.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha weakens but still poses risk to Gulf Coast
item.description: The storm is expected to bring gusty winds and rough surf as it moves westward.

item.title: Small Texas town challenges Trump's border wall plan from Mexico to Washington
item.description: A tiny Texas town opposes the administration's border wall plans, citing potential flooding and legal bypass.
